TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector>
Public Class ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector Implements IJsonModel(Of ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector), IPersistableModel(Of ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelector)

Docs.summary: A label selector is a label query over a set of resources. The result of matchLabels and matchExpressions are ANDed. An empty label selector matches all objects. A null label selector matches no objects.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelectorRequirement> MatchExpressions { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelectorRequirement> MatchExpressions
Public ReadOnly Property MatchExpressions As IList(Of ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelectorRequirement)
member this.MatchExpressions : System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterLoadBalancerLabelSelectorRequirement>

Docs.summary: matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<string> MatchLabels { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<string> MatchLabels
Public ReadOnly Property MatchLabels As IList(Of String)
member this.MatchLabels : System.Collections.Generic.IList<string>

Docs.summary: matchLabels is an array of {key=value} pairs. A single {key=value} in the matchLabels map is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is `key`, the operator is `In`, and the values array contains only `value`. The requirements are ANDed.
